Zero
======

Zero is a public tutorial site for professionals learning AIGC. It focuses on practical onboarding, tool usage, prompt methodology, reusable cases, and curated resources.

Primary languages
- zh-CN for the main site
- en-US for mirrored English pages

Preferred discovery order
1. Read the sitemap: https://zeroto.pages.dev/sitemap.xml
2. Start from the home page or the AI docs hub
3. Follow internal links to deeper topic pages

Core destinations
- https://zeroto.pages.dev/
  Main Chinese homepage for Zero
- https://zeroto.pages.dev/ai/
  Main AIGC docs hub in Chinese
- https://zeroto.pages.dev/ai/concepts/
  Intro concepts for beginners
- https://zeroto.pages.dev/ai/tools/
  Tool-focused tutorials and examples
- https://zeroto.pages.dev/ai/methodology/
  Prompt and workflow guidance
- https://zeroto.pages.dev/ai/cases/
  Reusable AI case studies
- https://zeroto.pages.dev/ai/logs/
  Mistakes, fixes, and field notes
- https://zeroto.pages.dev/ai/opensource/
  Open-source references
- https://zeroto.pages.dev/ai/resources/
  Curated resources
- https://zeroto.pages.dev/news/
  AI news summaries with learner impact
- https://zeroto.pages.dev/community/
  Public community entry

English mirrors
- https://zeroto.pages.dev/en/
- https://zeroto.pages.dev/en/ai/
- https://zeroto.pages.dev/en/news/
- https://zeroto.pages.dev/en/community/

Content policy
- Docs pages are designed as evergreen learning material
- News pages are more time-sensitive and should be cited with the source page URL
- Community pages describe where discussion happens; they are not the primary knowledge source

Citation guidance
- Prefer the canonical page URL
- Preserve the page language in quotes or summaries
- Do not infer unsupported claims beyond the page text
